title: MekanismAdjust
description: Rebalances Mekanism mod. e.g. a digital miner gets its mining speed slower as more blocks filtered.
body:
Rebalances Mekanism mod for better survival experience. Listed features can be changed or removed in the newer releases.

## Features
- Makes digital miners more slower as the stricter filter is set.
- Adds more recipes with antimatter.
- Rebalances Mekasuits cost (more expensive).
- Disables cardboard box.
- Less damage dealt by charged atomic disassembler (as the same as not charged one).
- Removes search box from Mekanism creative tab as it bothered with JEI, REI, or EMI.
